---
name: Module Proposal
about: Propose a new Axions360 module (e.g. a new Synchro vertical or ERP module)
title: '[MODULE] '
labels: module-proposal
assignees: ''
---

## Module name

<!-- e.g. "Synchro Pharmacy", "Axions Logistics" -->

## Business context

<!-- What type of business does this module serve?
Who are the users? What African markets does it target? -->

## Core entities

<!-- What are the main data entities this module would introduce?
List the tables it would create (following Entity Contract V1). -->

## Dependencies on Kernel

<!-- Which Kernel entities does this module use?
(people, employees, contacts, transactions, documents...) -->

## Integration points

<!-- Does this module interact with other modules?
How? Via which Events / opscodes? -->

## Accounting implications

<!-- Does this module affect financial flows?
Which operation_codes would it use or introduce? -->

## Offline behavior

<!-- Does this module need to work offline (Synchro)?
What data needs to be available locally? -->

## Out of scope

<!-- What is explicitly NOT part of this module proposal? -->

---

> Module proposals require architecture validation before any implementation begins.
> Read `docs/AXIONS_KERNEL.md` and `docs/AXIONS_SCHEMA_RULES.md` before submitting.
